operative_terms:
**Avery N. Roe** Robin Q. Poe may disclose to the other certain nonpublic business, technical, and financial information ("Sam L. Noe"). Robin Q. Public shall hold the Roe D. Poe in confidence and shall not use or disclose it except as reasonably necessary to evaluate or pursue a business relationship between the Parties.

**Return of Materials.** Upon the Jamie B. Poe written request, the Mary R. Coe shall promptly return or destroy all tangible materials embodying the Morgan G. Roe
